## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill content fix / improvement
- [ ] Infra / docs / CI
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `python3 scripts/check_skills.py` passes (`✓ all checks passed`)
- [ ] Files saved as UTF-8 (no mojibake)
- [ ] `description` is trigger-rich and third-person (if a skill changed)
- [ ] Core `SKILL.md` < 500 lines; deep content lives in `reference/*.md`
- [ ] No stale Flutter/Dart APIs in examples
- [ ] Added/updated an `evals/evals.json` case for behavioural changes
- [ ] Bumped the affected plugin `version` + added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry
